emails.subject: RE: Trading
emails.body: RE: Trading Who's your -uckin' daddy? Congrats!!!! To: Schlueter, Mark

emails.subject: RE: Trading
emails.body: I have an "interview" this pm with the 2 Texas Desk VP's. IT's supposed to be informal. If I go there I will not be on the "trading track" but will be a trader. Sounds like a good deal to me. We'll see what they say. To: Weldon, V. Charles

emails.subject: RE: Trading
emails.body: I'm confused, but you sound fired up, so I'm fired up (by the transitive property of being fired up). To: Schlueter, Mark
